title: Missing expected-admin validation in factory proxy
description: A proxy template delegates to an underlying factory without verifying that the expected admin matches the actual admin. A caller could pass a mismatched expectedAdmin, potentially redirecting the operation to a different factory or bypassing admin-specific restrictions.
recommendation: Always verify expectedAdmin == admin before delegating to external factory contracts.

oracle.description: Proxy/delegation patterns must verify the expected admin matches before forwarding.
oracle.static_signal: expectedAdmin parameter not compared to template admin field
oracle.symbolic_property: forall proxy. delegates(proxy, factory) => verified(proxy.admin == expectedAdmin)

notes: Common admin verification pattern in DAML delegation workflows.
